wine_bars.name: Prés Wine Bar and Store
wine_bars.wine_program: 100-plus Tokaj-Hegyalja wines by the glass and bottle; weekly wine-and-cheese seasonal pairings; wine lessons offered
wine_bars.description: Central Tokaj wine bar and bottle shop on Rákóczi utca, open from late morning to midnight in summer. A wine guide presents each pour; cold plates of Hungarian charcuterie and cheese accompany the selection.
wine_bars.tip: Friday-night guided tastings are informal and accessible for beginners.

wine_bars.name: Demeter Zoltán Vinoteka
wine_bars.wine_program: Portfolio bar for Demeter Zoltán Pincészet; Furmint and Aszú range; Anett Demeter leads afternoon tastings Thursday to Sunday
wine_bars.description: Opened 2025 in Tokaj old town, this intimate winebar pairs the Demeter Zoltán portfolio with freshly baked bread and cold cuts. One of the region's leading Furmint specialists.

wine_bars.name: A Boros Borbár
wine_bars.wine_program: Wide selection of Tokaji wines; regular Friday-night informal guided tastings; wine and snack pairings
wine_bars.description: Sárospatak's leading wine bar on the main Rákóczi street, open since 2015. Friday tastings are informal guided events; among the widest Tokaji ranges available by the glass in Sárospatak.

wine_bars.name: Sauska Padi Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Sauska sparkling and still Tokaj wines by the glass; panoramic terrace bar; connects to Padi restaurant
wine_bars.description: Stylish bar inside the Sauska Tokaj winery completed 2024, with open terraces overlooking the vineyards. Michelin Opening of the Year 2025 connection; sparkling and dry Furmint are the focus.
wine_bars.tip: Best visited at dusk for panoramic views across the vine-covered hillside.

wine_bars.name: Rákóczi Pince Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Hétszőlő estate wines plus guest Tokaj producers; above-cellar wine bar with access to Knight's Hall cellar
wine_bars.description: Above the 15th-century Rákóczi cellar on Tokaj's main square, this wine bar offers Hétszőlő wines and a regional selection. Evening pours in the historic courtyard in summer.

wine_bars.name: Percze Élményközpont Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Comprehensive Szepsy wine list with 20-plus cuvées; modern Hungarian small plates; vineyard views
wine_bars.description: Wine bar and experience centre in Mád with floor-to-ceiling windows facing the vineyards. List focuses on Szepsy single-vineyard Furmints and Aszú, with small plates and seasonal specials.

wine_bars.name: Winestone Wine Bar at Mercure Tokaj Center
wine_bars.wine_program: 120 local wines in a cellar-style bar; emphasis on Tokaj producers; summer riverfront wine terrace
wine_bars.description: Wine bar inside the Mercure Tokaj Center serving 120 different local wines with Hungarian cuisine. Summer wine terrace on the Bodrog riverfront; walking distance to the main square cellars.

wine_bars.name: Barta Pince Wine Shop
wine_bars.wine_program: Barta estate wines plus curated Mád producer selection; retail and glass pours
wine_bars.description: Wine shop run by Barta Winery in Mád with a curated multi-producer list from the Tokaj-Hegyalja. Estate wines include organic Furmint cuvées; adjacent to the Rákóczi-Aspremont Mansion guesthouse.

wine_bars.name: Gróf Degenfeld Wine Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Estate wines: Furmint, Hárslevelű, Yellow Muscat, and Aszú; structured cellar tastings of 5 to 8 wines
wine_bars.description: Wine bar at the four-star Gróf Degenfeld Castle Hotel in Tarcal, surrounded by 35 ha of estate vineyards. Estate winemaker leads structured flights; romantic castle setting in the heart of Tokaj-Hegyalja.

wine_bars.name: Viracocha Bar at Minaro Hotel Tokaj
wine_bars.wine_program: Tokaj regional wines; Saturday Wine Tales series with winery guests from Béres, Oremus, Sauska
wine_bars.description: Hotel bar at the Minaro MGallery offering panoramic vineyard views. Hosts the complimentary 12-week Saturday Wine Tales tasting series; acclaimed cocktail programme alongside Tokaj regional wines.

wine_bars.name: Sárospataki Borterasz
wine_bars.wine_program: Tokaj-Hegyalja wines by the glass; seasonal terrace; Hungarian bites
wine_bars.description: Open-air wine terrace bar in Sárospatak serving regional wines with a focus on Tokaj producers. Relaxed terrace setting near the Rákóczi Castle; popular with locals in summer.

wine_bars.name: Talu Restaurant Bar at Andrássy Kúria
wine_bars.wine_program: Curated Tokaj-Hegyalja wines; gourmet Hungarian food pairings; Gault and Millau two-hat recognition
wine_bars.description: Bar adjoining the Talu Restaurant at Andrássy Kúria five-star hotel. Curated Tokaj wine selection paired with regional Hungarian cuisine; also gateway to the VinoSense spa with vinotherapy treatments.

wine_bars.name: Hercegkúti Pincék Cellar Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Tokaj-Hegyalja wines in a UNESCO-listed cellar setting; tastings with Gombos-hegy cellar atmosphere
wine_bars.description: Wine tasting in the Gombos-hegyi cellar row of Hercegkút, a Swabian village where the mould-covered rhyolite-tufa tunnels are a UNESCO World Heritage site. Seasonal cellar openings through local producers.

wine_bars.name: Disznókő Wine Boutique and Bar
wine_bars.wine_program: Full Disznókő range from 1992 vintage; Sárga Borház restaurant on-site for wine dinners
wine_bars.description: Disznókő's on-site wine boutique stocking the estate's entire range, with the Sárga Borház restaurant hosting wine dinners pairing Disznókő with other leading Tokaj producers. Seasonal opening May through October.
